name: The Restless Jackpot: Marigold Monete
description:
"All’s fair in gambling, after all."

Gambling has always been a dangerous game.

And, like it or not, life itself is full of gambles.

Sure, hard work and preparation can stack the odds in your favor, and there are limits to what luck alone can accomplish.

But a gamble, no matter how favorable the odds, remains a gamble.

Everyone is a gambler in their own way—but some are far better at it than others.

One such gambler is Marigold Monete, a gambler among gamblers.

Marigold is as dangerous as she is lucky, wielding her uncanny luck as a weapon to achieve her goals.

So, how will your luck hold up against hers?

Go Big or Go Home:

"Jackpot!"

CW: Selling of Children, HItwoman, Gambling, Death.
creator: Dracob
